fields.name: package_name
fields.title: Package Name
fields.description: Canonical registry name of the package

fields.name: dependency_name
fields.title: Dependency Name
fields.description: Alias name as declared in the project manifest (same as package_name when no alias is used)

fields.name: dependency_type
fields.title: Dependency Type
fields.description: Whether this is a production or development dependency

fields.name: is_optional_dependency
fields.title: Is Optional Dependency
fields.description: Whether this is a development/optional dependency

fields.name: time_lag_days
fields.title: Time Lag (Days)
fields.description: Days between installed and latest version release

fields.name: releases_lag
fields.title: Releases Lag
fields.description: Number of releases between installed and latest

fields.name: cve_count
fields.title: CVE Count
fields.description: Number of known CVEs for this package

fields.name: version_constraint
fields.title: Version Constraint
fields.description: Version specifier declared in the project manifest (e.g. '^1.2.3', '>=1.0,<2.0')

fields.name: constraint_type
fields.title: Constraint Type
fields.description: How the version constraint was applied: DECLARED (loose/default spec), NARROWED (explicit range with bounds), PINNED (exact version), ADDITIVE (narrows via constraints file), or OVERRIDE (forces a version regardless of other requirements)

fields.name: constraint_source_file
fields.title: Constraint Source File
fields.description: File that introduced a non-DECLARED constraint (e.g. 'package.json', 'pyproject.toml', 'requirements.txt')

fields.name: extras
fields.title: Extras
fields.description: PyPI extras requested for this dependency, comma-separated (e.g. 'security,tests'); empty when none

fields.name: license
fields.title: License
fields.description: SPDX license identifier or license name as declared in the package registry

fields.name: purl
fields.title: Package URL (PURL)
fields.description: Package URL per ECMA-386, e.g. pkg:pypi/requests@2.25.1 or pkg:npm/lodash@4.17.21
